---
title: "Installation"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Installation}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: pkgs
use("tibble", "lst")
use("glue", "glue")
```
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
pkg_nm <- "nemo"
org_nm <- "tidywf"
ver <- as.character(utils::packageVersion(pkg_nm))
conda <- tibble::lst(
  pkg = paste0("r-", pkg_nm),
  env = paste0(pkg_nm, "_env"),
  url = glue("https://anaconda.org/{org_nm}/{pkg}")
)
dir1 <- system.file("doc-templates/installation", package = pkg_nm)
```

There are several ways to install {`r pkg_nm`}:

### R

```{r child=file.path(dir1, "_r.qmd")}
#| label: child-r
```

### Conda

```{r child=file.path(dir1, "_conda.qmd")}
#| label: child-conda
```

### Pixi

```{r child=file.path(dir1, "_pixi.qmd")}
#| label: child-pixi
```
